title: elatostematoides manillensis var. manillensis
intro: Elatostematoides manillensis var. manillensis is a plant species that belongs to the family Elatostemaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Elatostematoides manillensis var. manillensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
